g.text: • Extracts & regrids surface layers of 3D variables
• Implements hybrid spatial interpolation & units correction
• Computes OBSEA DTO local columns (200m, 50 depth levels)
• Replaces sub-seabed physical data with NaN values
Maps for SST, CHL, Waves, and Current Speeds
Compares model 3D fields vs in-situ OBSEA CTD data
Interactive visual dashboards for project reports
Serves 12 Unified Datasets via Docker Container (conf/datasets.xml)
Seamless REST API | WMS Mapping Server | Direct Formats (NetCDF, CSV, JSON, PNG)
